'''parate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:currishly|currishly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-r-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:currishly|currishly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| parate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:parate|parate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:paratesher|paratesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:paratesherĂ«m|paratesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:paratero|paratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:parateshĂ«|parateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:parateshĂ«m|parateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiparatero|gokiparatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiparateshĂ«|gokiparateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiparateshĂ«m|gokiparateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goparankerom|goparankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goparankeshĂ«|goparankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goparankeshĂ«m|goparankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goparankeya|goparankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:paraterom|paraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:paratemu|paratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:parateya|parateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiparaterom|gokiparaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiparatemu|gokiparatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiparateya|gokiparateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:pararate|pararate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pararatesher|pararatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pararatesherĂ«m|pararatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pararatero|pararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pararateshĂ«|pararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pararateshĂ«m|pararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipararatero|gokipararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipararateshĂ«|gokipararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipararateshĂ«m|gokipararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopararankerom|gopararankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopararankeshĂ«|gopararankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopararankeshĂ«m|gopararankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopararankeya|gopararankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pararaterom|pararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pararatemu|pararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pararateya|pararateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipararaterom|gokipararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipararatemu|gokipararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipararateya|gokipararateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠrĂŠte|pĂŠrĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠrĂŠtesher|pĂŠrĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠrĂŠtero|pĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠrĂŠtero|gokipĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠrĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠrĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopĂŠrĂŠnkeya|gopĂŠrĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠrĂŠterom|pĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠrĂŠtemu|pĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠrĂŠteya|pĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠrĂŠterom|gokipĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠrĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠrĂŠteya|gokipĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafrafte|pafrafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafraftesher|pafraftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafraftesherĂ«m|pafraftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafraftero|pafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafrafteshĂ«|pafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafrafteshĂ«m|pafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafraftero|gokipafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafrafteshĂ«|gokipafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafrafteshĂ«m|gokipafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafrafnkerom|gopafrafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafrafnkeshĂ«|gopafrafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafrafnkeshĂ«m|gopafrafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafrafnkeya|gopafrafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafrafterom|pafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafraftemu|pafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafrafteya|pafrafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafrafterom|gokipafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafraftemu|gokipafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafrafteya|gokipafrafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
